'''dayoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabayah|kabayah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabayah|kabayah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dayoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyeteth|dæyeteth]] || [[word:dæyetej|dæyetej]] || [[word:dæyetesh|dæyetesh]] || [[word:dæyete|dæyete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayoyototh|dayoyototh]] || [[word:dayoyotoj|dayoyotoj]] || [[word:dayoyotosh|dayoyotosh]] || [[word:dayoyoto|dayoyoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayototh|dayototh]] || [[word:dayotoj|dayotoj]] || [[word:dayotosh|dayotosh]] || [[word:dayoto|dayoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayoftoth|dayoftoth]] || [[word:dayoftoj|dayoftoj]] || [[word:dayoftosh|dayoftosh]] || [[word:dayoftof|dayoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayototho|dayototho]] || [[word:dayotojo|dayotojo]] || [[word:dayotosho|dayotosho]] || [[word:dayotoko|dayotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayototh|dayototh]] || [[word:dayotoj|dayotoj]] || [[word:dayotosh|dayotosh]] || [[word:dayoto|dayoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayotothol|dayotothol]] || [[word:dayotojol|dayotojol]] || [[word:dayotoshol|dayotoshol]] || [[word:dayotokol|dayotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayotothotho|dayotothotho]] || [[word:dayotojojo|dayotojojo]] || [[word:dayotoshosho|dayotoshosho]] || [[word:dayotoko|dayotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayotothon|dayotothon]] || [[word:dayotojon|dayotojon]] || [[word:dayotoshon|dayotoshon]] || [[word:dayotokon|dayotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayotothoro|dayotothoro]] || [[word:dayotojoro|dayotojoro]] || [[word:dayotoshoro|dayotoshoro]] || [[word:dayotokoro|dayotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
